stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In case of failure of the TRU 1: (NB: all contactors not mentioned are assumed to remain open)

options.a: DC BUS 1 cannot be fed via DC BAT BUS.
options.b: DC BUS 1 can be fed by TRU 2 if C3.1 and C3.2 are closed.
options.c: DC BUS 1 can be fed by TRU 2 via DC BUS 2 and DC BAT BUS if C5.3, C7.4 and C7.1 are closed.
options.d: DC BUS 1 can be fed via DC ESS BUS if C5.1, C3.1 and C5.2 are closed.
